get.description: Retrieve the active channel subscriptions for the authenticated user.

type.description: The channel type. Defaults to 'session' if not set.

parent.description: The parent channel's uid, if any

private.description: Whether or not this channel is private.

party.description: A list of user IDs allowed to access this private channel.

archived.description: Whether or not this channel is archived.

ref.description: The Channel's `uid`. The git branch Ace creates and pushes is namespaced as `ace/<uid>`; this field stores the bare `uid`.

base.description: The base git branch that the current `ref` is targeting. An upstream branch (e.g. the default branch) is stored verbatim; a parent session target is stored as the bare parent `uid` (its git branch is `ace/<uid>`).

url.description: The URL exposed by the MicroVM for internal Ace operations.

post.description: Destroy the orphaned new lobby VM when rebuild fails.
Mint a fresh vmbridge nonce for the given VM, authenticated by the supervisor nonce.
Resume a suspended VM sandbox, authenticated by the vmbridge secret.
Forward a port on the VM sandbox, authenticated by the vmbridge secret.

url.description: The public proxy URL for the forwarded port.

post.description: Archive a channel from its VM after PR merge, authenticated by the vmbridge secret.
Accept debug log entries from the supervisor (temporary, remove after testing).

get.description: Retrieve all members of a channel

post.description: Use Claude to summarize recent GitHub activity.

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp for the start of the activity window

post.description: Use Claude to generate a team-level narrative and per-person summaries of recent GitHub activity.

items.description: PRs and issues authored by this person

summary.description: LLM-generated paragraph about this person's activity

post.description: Use Claude to generate personalized suggestions for resuming sessions or opening new ones for PRs and issues.

hasCommits.description: Whether the session has unpushed commits

prs.description: Open PRs the user is involved with

hasSession.description: Whether a session already exists for this PR

issues.description: Open issues assigned to the user

completedPrs.description: Recently merged PRs authored by the user

completedIssues.description: Recently closed issues the user was involved with

post.description: Use Claude to generate a poetic greeting combining weather, time of day, and recent activity.

weather.description: Weather condition: sunny, rainy, cloudy, hot, foggy, or snowy

opener.description: Poetic weather/time greeting with name, max ~8 words

access.description: Whether Ace has a Repository access grant.

status.description: Whether the repository can enter its Lobby.

query.description: Repository search query or exact owner/repo.

status.description: Whether the repository can enter its Lobby.

status.description: Whether the repository can enter its Lobby.

post.description: Mint a fine-grained GitHub App installation token scoped to a single repository.

kind.description: The type of access token to mint.

token.description: A repo-scoped GitHub App installation access token.

expires_at.description: The expiration time of the access token.

url.description: The authorization URL for WebSocket connection.

token.description: The short-lived access token for Azure WebPubSub.

get.description: Issue client access tokens for Azure services.
Init GitHub Ace app installation & OAuth login.
Exchanges code for token and redirects to the client.

post.description: Exchange a GitHub refresh token for a new access token.

refresh_token.description: The GitHub refresh token to exchange for a new access token.

expires_in.description: Seconds until the access token expires.

refresh_token_expires_in.description: Seconds until the refresh token expires.

get.description: Redirects to the GitHub App installation page for managing org/repo access.
